text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Oh man, how did this happen? There's no
doubt... I've gained weight!)

text_block_list.name: Man A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for lending a hand, Kita! Here, have a
sweet steamed bun for the road!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Are you sure I can have this? Yay, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Lady A
text_block_list.text:
You helped me out a bunch, little lady! I don't
suppose these are the best of gifts, but please
have these rice crackers as thanks!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You're welcome! And thanks for the snack!

text_block_list.name: Older Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Hey, Kita! Here, want some candy? ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's thoughtfulness made me so happy, I
ended up accepting everything they gave me,
but...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to start refusing snacks. I'll just accept
their feelings of gratitude instead!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following this revelation, Kitasan Black
reluctantly declines everyone's offer of snacks
and successfully gets back in shape.
